traits.name: Stand Firm
traits.text: While the Line-Bender is adjacent to an ally, it has +3 stability (5 total), can't be knocked prone, and can't be frightened.

traits.name: Dead Stone
traits.text: While the Line-Bender is standing on scree or dead stone, its bending abilities are disabled — it can only make free strikes.

traits.name: Measure Thrice
traits.text: The Line-Bender takes no opportunity attacks. It won't move and use a main action on the same turn UNLESS it is executing the score (Codified Edict IS the score — exempt).

traits.name: The Pause (1/encounter)
traits.text: When any creature dies within 10 squares, all Line-Benders lose their next turn, witnessing. (Director note: this is exploitable — players should be able to discover and weaponize it.)

traits.name: Crew-Chief Upgrade (Varresk, Zedh)
traits.text: Crew-chiefs/reckoners use this same stat block with +15 Stamina (45 total) and +1 to power rolls (set roll_bonus and flatBonus to 3 on Stone Haul).

maneuver.name: Codified Edict
maneuver.effect: The Line-Bender moves up to its speed toward an enemy, then makes a free strike. Every ally adjacent to it when this maneuver starts may also move up to their speed. (Faction maneuver — this counts as executing the score for Measure Thrice.)

effects.text: Move up to speed toward an enemy.
Free strike at the end of the move.
Codified Edict: every ally adjacent to the Line-Bender when the maneuver started may also move up to their speed (move them manually).

action.name: Stone Haul
action.effect: The Line-Bender folds the stone underfoot and reels the target back toward the formation — into the Stand Firm wall and free-strike range.

action.name: Convened Working
action.effect: Requires 2+ Line-Benders ADJACENT to each other, each spending their main action. No roll. Choose one: raise a 3-square wall (10 Stamina per square), open a 2-square pit, or fold a ramp. A +1 tally-stroke appears carved into the worked stone. Codified Edict then marches the block in — this is why they cluster.

effects.text: CONVENED WORKING — requires 2+ adjacent Line-Benders each spending a main action. GM: raise a 3-square wall (10 Stamina/square), open a 2-square pit, or fold a ramp. Mark a +1 tally-stroke on the worked stone.
